# CGFontPostScriptFormat.type42

**Case**

A constant representing a Type 42 font format.

## Declaration

```swift
case type42
```

## Description

This is documented in *Adobe Technical Note 5012, The Type 42 Font Format Specification*, which is available from [http://partners.adobe.com/].

## Constants

- **CGFontPostScriptFormat.type1**: A Type 1 font format.
- **CGFontPostScriptFormat.type3**: A Type 3 PostScript format.
title: CGFontPostScriptFormat.type42
